rows.label: qev060801_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ummm... This is quite an advanced
device... I'm completely at a loss...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0002
rows.name:
...You there! Are you familiar with
Zaruboggan machines by any chance?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0003
rows.name:
If you possess such knowledge, I would
like to ask you to teach me something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_JNK0010
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev060801_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask what he is trying to repair.

rows.label: qev060801_JNK0020
rows.name: Suggest

rows.label: qev060801_SEL0021
rows.name: Advise him that hitting it will fix it.

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0004
rows.name:
Oh! I like people who are
brimming with curiosity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0005
rows.name:
You see, I was trying to repair
the backpack he always wears.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0006
rows.name:
However, things haven't been going very
well... Which is why I sought your help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0007
rows.name:
We Zaruboggan use this to remove the excess
materials from Voltant, allowing us to revoltant
the pure, unadulterated impurities, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0008
rows.name:
If there's something mixed into the Voltant, it
could be life-threatening in the worst-case
scenario, so I have to repair it quickly, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0009
rows.name: Ahh! What an uncivilized idea![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0010
rows.name:
I simply cannot bring myself to
like that sort of short-sighted
thinking from Earthlings![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0011
rows.name:
In the first place, this backpack
is a vital device for purifying
Voltant, the source of their life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0012
rows.name:
If I were to hit it and it broke entirely,
it would become a massive disaster![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0013
rows.name:
That's true... It could be life-threatening
in the worst-case scenario, so... that
method is a bit scary, I suppose.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0014
rows.name:
Hmmm... If I at least had a
general-purpose plug part, I might
be able to manage something...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0015
rows.name:
That's right, you there! If you don't
mind, could you obtain one for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0016
rows.name:
Please! My friend's life might
be on the line... perhaps! Please
help me fix his backpack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0017
rows.name:
I am counting on you! While you are out
fetching the material, I will proceed
with the analysis of the backpack here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0018
rows.name:
I stake my pride as a Ma-non on
completely understanding its
structure and repairing it for you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0019
rows.name:
I thought there was no machine
in this universe that a Ma-non
could not understand, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0020
rows.name: Hmmm... This one seems quite profound.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0021
rows.name:
I am counting on you to obtain the general-purpose
plug part, alright? As long as I have that, it
seems I can at least manage the repairs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0022
rows.name:
How did it go? Did you succeed in
obtaining the general-purpose plug part?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0023
rows.name:
I've mostly grasped the structure of the
backpack as well, so with that, it seems
I can perform the repairs immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0024
rows.name:
This is exactly it! Now then, shall
I begin the repairs right away?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0025
rows.name:
It seems the Voltant was leaking inside
the backpack. No wonder there had been
a strange smell for a while now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0026
rows.name:
Oh... does it look like you can
fix it? That's a huge help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0027
rows.name:
You really are a good person. Are
all Ma-non such good people?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0028
rows.name:
How should I say this? Unlike you
serious folks, many of us don't
even properly keep our promises...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0029
rows.name:
...From the perspective of you
Earthlings, how do we Ma-non appear?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_JNK0030
rows.name: Approve

rows.label: qev060801_SEL0031
rows.name: State a favorable viewpoint.

rows.label: qev060801_JNK0040
rows.name: Disapprove

rows.label: qev060801_SEL0041
rows.name: State a critical viewpoint.

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0030
rows.name:
Right! Even among my Zaruboggan
brethren, there isn't anyone who
would be this considerate of me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0031
rows.name:
Heheh! Looking closely, you seem to have
a bit of that yourself. How should I put
it, you have a Ma-non-esque vibe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0032
rows.name:
Eating nothing but pizza, being
overly familiar... I actually find
those aspects fascinating, though.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0033
rows.name:
...Well, you seem like the serious type even among
Earthlings. I can understand why you might find
that sort of thing difficult to deal with.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0034
rows.name:
Hmm... From my perspective, an
honest Zaruboggan like you feels
much more approachable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0035
rows.name: ...Alright! It is fixed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0036
rows.name:
Atheron, you must treat that
backpack with a little more
care from now on... Yo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0037
rows.name: Huh...? ...What is this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0038
rows.name: I can't... control my body...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060801_MSG0039
rows.name: ………………[ST:wait ]
